description:
Hi,

The Asha Show signal keeps breaking up on 94.7 around Soweto between 06:30 and 07:00. It has been happening all week during the morning drive. Can you look into the transmitter?

Thanks,
Nandi
subject: Poor reception during morning show in Soweto

description:
Hello,

There are far too many ad breaks on The Asha Show lately. I counted six in one hour this morning. It is putting me off my favourite show. Please cut down the adverts.

Lwandile
subject: Too many advert breaks during the show

description:
Hi Asha,

Why did the Voices of the City feature disappear from Tuesday mornings? It was the best part of my week. Please bring it back.

Regards,
Priya
subject: Voices of the City segment missing on Tuesday

description:
Hi,

The presenter keeps talking over the start and end of the songs on the morning show. I just want to hear the music. Can the team please fade in cleanly?

Zinhle
subject: Presenter talks over the songs

description:
Hi team,

I entered the morning competition three times last week and never got a call back, but the same voices keep winning. Is it actually open to everyone?

Themba
subject: Competition winners seem to repeat

description:
Hello,

The online stream of Rhythm FM keeps buffering during The Asha Show when I listen at work in Pretoria. The FM signal is fine but the app cuts out every few minutes.

Lerato
subject: Online stream buffering during the show

description:
Hi Asha,

You play the same three new songs on repeat every morning. Please mix in more variety, especially some local artists. Otherwise love the show.

Sibongile
subject: Same songs repeated every morning

description:
Hi,

The traffic report is always read too late, after I am already stuck on the M1. Could you move it earlier in the morning show, say before 07:00?

Karabo
subject: Traffic report comes too late in the show

description:
Hello Rhythm FM,

The station jingles are much louder than the rest of the show. Every time one plays I have to turn the volume down in the car. Please level the audio.

Ayanda
subject: Jingles much louder than the rest of the show

description:
Hi Asha,

The interview guest this morning was cut off mid-sentence to go to an ad. It was a great conversation and very frustrating to lose it. Please give guests more time.

Tshepo
subject: Guest interview cut off for an advert

description:
Hi team,

The podcast version of The Asha Show interviews is days late again on the website. I rely on it because I work early. Can you upload them the same day?

Refilwe
subject: Show podcast uploads are late

description:
Hello,

Reception in the Vaal Triangle is very weak on 94.7. I can only get The Asha Show clearly if I drive towards Johannesburg. Any plans for a booster down here?

Bongani
subject: Weak signal in the Vaal Triangle

description:
Hi Asha,

Could you please bring back the Spanish word of the day? My kids loved learning it with you on the drive to school. It made the mornings fun.

Mpho
subject: Please bring back the Spanish word of the day

description:
Hi,

The news bulletin headlines were repeated word for word three times this morning between 06:00 and 08:00. Surely there is more news than that. Please refresh them.

Anele
subject: News headlines repeated unchanged all morning

description:
Hello Rhythm FM,

The Listen Live button on the website does nothing on my phone browser. I tap it and the player never loads. Tested on two phones in Melville.

Fatima
subject: Listen Live button does not work on mobile

description:
Hi Asha,

The show seems to start a few minutes late most mornings, with dead air or a long jingle before you come on. Just letting you know in case it is a scheduling issue.

Dumisani
subject: Show starts late with dead air
